name: Celery Stuffed with Blue Cheese
recipeIngredient: 12 Outside ribs celery, trimmed and cut into 3-inch lengths
1 dash Tabasco or other hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the celery by trimming and cutting it into 3-inch lengths. Place in a bowl of ice water and cover; refrigerate until ready to serve.
2. In a food processor, puree the ricotta and cottage cheese until smooth. Transfer to a small bowl.
3. Add the crumbled blue cheese mixture and a dash of Tabasco; stir until blended. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. At serving time, drain the celery and pat dry with paper towels.
5. Stuff each rib of celery with a rounded teaspoonful of the blue cheese mixture and arrange on a platter.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 44 calories; 2 grams total fat; 4 grams protein; 2 grams carbohydrates; 7 milligrams cholesterol; 152 milligrams sodium.
